sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for this shmup title

special_mechanics.name: Speed Level Selection
special_mechanics.description: Player's ship can switch between three different speed levels at any time, allowing fast movement to avoid enemies or slow movement to weave between bullets

special_mechanics.name: Health System
special_mechanics.description: Ship has three hit points and can take multiple hits before losing a life; health is persistent between levels

special_mechanics.name: Smart Bomb Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Player can sacrifice a stored weapon to produce a smart bomb effect, clearing enemies and freeing weapon slot

tier_notes: Tier 2: Game is a horizontal scrolling shmup; no precise physics parameters documented. Sources contain gameplay mechanics but not quantified movement values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel systems typical of platformers.
